title: Add Hooks support to podman
body:
Also mv libkpod config into libpod.  Still needs more cleanup,
but this gets us to one library.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: Changes LGTM, but libostree is causing havoc with the tests.
@mheon Tests are passing,
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 00d38cb) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
I am now blocked on https://github.com/kubernetes-incubator/cri-o/pull/1244

@mheon @TomSweeneyRedHat @baude PTAL
@rhatdan I think you accidentally rebased out the parts where hooks are called
@mheon PTAL
@rhatdan It still doesn't look like SetupHooks() is being called anywhere. Otherwise, it looks fine. If this is intentional I'm good to merge.
Well sadly this is still not fully working.  Seems like runc is not actually executing the hooks.  Will continue looking into this.  Now runs a test to make sure the hooks fires.
